opus_reference_baseline.notes: claude-opus-4-7: sampling params deprecated, omit entirely

meeting_minutes_extraction.purpose: Full 21-type meeting minutes extraction. Routes to claude-haiku-4-5-20251001. This entry supersedes the prior P8-A Sonnet upgrade: the meeting_minutes_extraction lane is migrated back to claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 by operator direction.
meeting_minutes_extraction.notes: Migrated back to claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, superseding the P8-A claude-sonnet-4-6 upgrade. ONE Haiku pass produces the whole 21-type payload. max_tokens is the transport budget for that single whole-transcript response, NOT an eval gate: a full 34-chunk extraction emits the entire payload (decisions/action_items/open_questions + ~20 structured arrays + grounding) in one response and needs well past 8192 output tokens; 16384 is the proven non-truncating value (same root cause documented in workflows/llm_client.py::_MAX_TOKENS and create_opus_reference_baselines._OPUS_MAX_TOKENS). A still-over-budget or malformed response is STILL blocked fail-closed by the unchanged strict-schema eval — nothing is weakened by the model swap.

note: No hardcoded model strings anywhere in code. All model resolution must use the registry. Update this file to migrate model versions.
